basic_details.job_title: NHM SHSRC Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Health Mission State Health Systems Resource Centres (NHM SHSRC)
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission State Health Systems Resource Centres (NHM SHSRC) Advisor - Digital Health & Analytics Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nhm.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NHM SHSRC Advisor - Digital Health & Analytics Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Health Informatics / Public Health / Health Systems / Health Management along with background in Information Technology, Computer Science, Data Science or related digital health disciplines, Postgraduate degree in Computer Science / Information Technology / Data Science / Health Informatics with demonstrated experience in health systems, public health programmes or digital health platforms
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in Health Informatics / Public Health / Health Systems / Health Management, along with a background in Information Technology, Computer Science, Data Science or related digital health disciplines, or Postgraduate degree in Computer Science / Information Technology / Data Science / Health Informatics, with demonstrated experience working in health systems, public health programmes or digital health platforms

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHM SHSRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.national_health_mission_state_health_sys: Postgraduate degree in Health Informatics / Public Health / Health Systems / Health Management along with background in Information Technology, Computer Science, Data Science or related digital health disciplines, Postgraduate degree in Computer Science / Information Technology / Data Science / Health Informatics with demonstrated experience in health systems, public health programmes or digital health platforms

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Advisor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NHM SHSRC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NHM SHSRC Advisor - Digital Health & Analytics Job 2026 Notification PDF

NHM SHSRC Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Postgraduate degree in Health Informatics / Public Health / Health Systems / Health Management, along with a background in Information Technology, Computer Science, Data Science or related digital health disciplines, or Postgraduate degree in Computer Science / Information Technology / Data Science / Health Informatics, with demonstrated experience working in health systems, public health programmes or digital health platforms

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Advisor - Digital Health & Analytics Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
NHM SHSRC Advisor - Digital Health & Analytics Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHM SHSRC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHM SHSRC Advisor - Digital Health & Analytics Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHM SHSRC Advisor – Digital Health & Analytics recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NHM SHSRC Advisor – Digital Health & Analytics position is 23rd July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Advisor – Digital Health & Analytics post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy announced for the position of Advisor – Digital Health & Analytics under the National Health Mission State Health Systems Resource Centres recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Advisor – Digital Health & Analytics role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Postgraduate degree in Health Informatics, Public Health, Health Systems, or Health Management with a background in IT, Computer Science, Data Science, or related digital health disciplines. Alternatively, a Postgraduate degree in Computer Science, IT, Data Science, or Health Informatics with relevant experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts, including the Advisor – Digital Health & Analytics position, is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the NHM SHSRC Advisor – Digital Health & Analytics posts?
faq.answer: The application process for the Advisor – Digital Health & Analytics position is entirely online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official NHM SHSRC website.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contractual position. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the Advisor – Digital Health & Analytics role.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct download link for the official notification PDF is available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. Does the NHM SHSRC offer any age relaxation for candidates?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for information on age relaxation policies.
